title: Acetone precipitation of proteins
steps: Add 4 times the volume -20°C acetone to the extract and vortexed
Centrifuge at 14000 x g for 4 min at 4°C and discard the supernatant 00:04:00
Wash pellet twice with a 4:1 acetone/water mixture at -20°C until the pellet is well broken up
Centrifuge at 14000 x g at 4°C for 10 min between each washing step (2x)
After final centrifugation, incubate solutaion at 40°C until approximately 80% of the liquid evaporated
Resuspend pellet in remaining liquid. Store at -80°C for long term use or -20°C for short term use
creator: Igem Dusseldorf
